auth.loginSubtitle: Log in to manage services, requests, and messages.
auth.registerSubtitle: Create an account and start using the services marketplace.
auth.registerSuccess: Account created. Check your email for confirmation, if enabled.

landing.desc: A services and orders platform for Naryn Region. Repair, delivery, IT, cleaning — fast and without middlemen.
landing.placeAdDesc: Are you a specialist? Create a listing. Need help? Describe your task — all in one place.
landing.howStep1Desc: Browse services by category, use search or filter by district and price.
landing.howStep2Desc: Review profiles, ratings and reviews. All specialists are from Naryn Region.
landing.howStep3Desc: Message the specialist via built-in chat, discuss details and agree on terms.
landing.benefit1Desc: Open profiles, ratings and client reviews help you make the right choice.
landing.benefit2Desc: Specialists from your area — fast response and local knowledge.
landing.benefit3Desc: Built-in chat to communicate with specialists — no phone calls or middlemen.
landing.benefit4Desc: Post your service or leave a request — specialists will find you.
landing.ctaDesc: Sign up for free and find the right specialist right now

about.title: Naryn Services
about.subtitle: First services and orders platform for Naryn Region of Kyrgyzstan
about.missionText: We created this platform to help residents of Naryn Region easily find specialists nearby — without unnecessary phone calls, intermediaries, or long searches.
about.forWhoText: The platform is created for residents of Naryn Region: Naryn, At-Bashy, Kochkor, Jumgal, and Ak-Talaa districts.
about.howWeWorkText: Specialists post their services, clients leave orders. Everyone communicates directly through the built-in chat — no commissions.
about.plansText: We are constantly developing the platform: adding new categories, improving the interface, and expanding geography.
about.ctaDesc: More than 500 specialists are already registered on the platform

howPage.title: How it works
howPage.subtitle: Just 4 steps to find the right specialist or receive your first order
howPage.step1Desc: Create a free account in a few minutes. Enter your name, contacts and choose your role — client or specialist.
howPage.step2Desc: Use search, select a category or browse the directory of specialists.
howPage.step3Desc: Click "Contact" — this will open a chat with the specialist. Discuss details, deadlines, and cost.
howPage.step4Desc: Agree on terms, complete the job, and leave an honest review.
howPage.ctaDesc: Registration is free and takes less than a minute

rules.title: Terms of Use
rules.s1Item1: The "Naryn Services" platform is designed to search for and offer services in the Naryn Region of Kyrgyzstan.
rules.s1Item2: By registering on the platform, you agree to these rules.
rules.s1Item3: The administration reserves the right to make changes to the rules, notifying users in advance.
rules.s2Item1: Post orders with a clear and honest description of the task.
rules.s2Item2: Communicate respectfully with specialists in chat.
rules.s2Item3: Do not post requests for services that violate the laws of the Kyrgyz Republic.
rules.s2Item4: Leave objective reviews after the work is completed.
rules.s3Item1: Provide accurate information about your services, experience, and prices.
rules.s3Item2: Complete work on schedule and in accordance with agreements.
rules.s3Item3: Do not inflate prices after agreeing on conditions with the client.
rules.s4Item1: Advertisements violating the laws of the Kyrgyz Republic are prohibited.
rules.s4Item2: Advertising of illegal goods and services is prohibited.
rules.s4Item3: Insults, threats, and discriminatory statements in chat are prohibited.
rules.s4Item4: Creating fake accounts and inflating reviews is prohibited.
rules.s5Item1: The platform acts as an intermediary and is not responsible for the quality of services rendered.
rules.s5Item2: All disputes between the client and specialist are resolved directly between the parties.
rules.s5Item3: Upon violation of rules, the account may be blocked without warning.

dashboard.demoReview2: Very polite specialist, arrived on time, fixed everything in half an hour. Highly recommend!

myAds.title: My listings
myAds.emptyText: You don't have any active listings yet. You can create a service or post an order.
myAds.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this listing?

createListing.title: Post a listing
createListing.placeholderServiceTitle: Example: Electrician services, washing machine repair
createListing.placeholderOrderTitle: Example: Need to fix a faucet, clean the apartment
createListing.placeholderServiceDesc: Describe in detail what you offer, what tasks you perform...
createListing.placeholderOrderDesc: Describe in detail the task, requirements for the specialist, scope of work...
createListing.placeholderOrderAddress: Specify the exact address of work execution (optional)
createListing.placeholderServicePrice: Specify the cost of the service in Soms (optional)
createListing.tip1Desc: Briefly and clearly describe the essence of the offer or task. For example: "Lock repair" or "Need cleaning of a 2-room apartment".
createListing.tip2Desc: The more details you specify, the more accurately specialists or clients can estimate the scope of work and cost.
createListing.tip3DescService: Too low or too high a price can scare away potential clients. Specify a fair starting price.
createListing.tip3DescOrder: Specify the real budget that you are willing to allocate for this task. This will attract the best specialists.
